title: diaphtheiro #1311
definition:
1) to change for the worse, to corrupt
    1a) of minds, morals
 2) to destroy, ruin
    2a) to consume
        2a1) of bodily vigour and strength
        2a2) of the worm or moth that eats provisions, clothing, etc.
    2b) to destroy, to kill
